case_title: VLADIMIR TIMIN VS. U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-15-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, CHANGE OF ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIMIN, VLADIMIR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER TATIANA IACONA PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY TIMIN, VLADIMIR AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIMIN, VLADIMIR ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIMIN, VLADIMIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT U-HAUL CO. OF CALIFORNIA $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,400.00, THE COURT TERMINATES THE RENTAL AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. IN LIEU OF PAYMENT OF MONEY DAMAGES, DEFENDANT MAY RELEASE PLAINTIFF'S PERSONAL PROPERTY FROM STORAGE AND RETURN IT TO PLAINTIFF. THE RETURN OF PLAINTIFF'S STORED PROPERTY WILL SATISFY THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
